name: Keyboard Maestro
description: Visual macro automation for macOS with 300+ actions, triggers, and scripting support — developer-friendly macros.

seo.title: Keyboard Maestro — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Keyboard Maestro: Visual macro automation for macOS with 300+ actions, triggers, and scripting support — developer-friendly macros.

when_to_use: 300-action macro for a complex developer build-and-test cycle
Window layout automation triggered on app launch
Clipboard history manager with smart paste transformations
Hotkey-driven text expansion for development boilerplate
Scheduled macOS automation running recurring maintenance tasks

cons: UI dated compared to Raycast or Shortcuts
review.verdict: The most capable macOS automation tool for developers who outgrow Shortcuts but want a GUI.
review.best_for: Mac developers wanting deeper automation than Shortcuts with scripting escape hatches
review.not_for: Users content with built-in Shortcuts or preferring Raycasts modern aesthetic

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Standard subscription/seat plan; downgradable next cycle.
